_comment: The standing structural budget gate over the benchmark tour, checked by
ramps at ceiling, camera frozen - the numbers are only comparable under
that exact recipe). batchesMax guards against draw-count regressions,
batchesMin against something silently not rendering, trisMax against
content/LOD regressions; frame-ms is deliberately not gated. Budgets
move DELIBERATELY: edit this table in the same commit as the change
that moves a number, with the reason - see Docs/performance.md.
Baseline: post static-flag + sprite-run batching, macOS Debug trees
(classic ~8 vista batches after the static bake; field is the
documented 185-vs-4 instancing gap, gated out by verdict; the next
flavor's Metal metric compresses absolute counts - its budgets guard

lake.oscene._comment: trisMax raised for the 64x64 shared water plane (8192 tris, was 512): 16 quads under-sampled the ~12.6-unit swell wavelength (~2.3 verts/wave, Nyquist-borderline) and aliased into phantom double crests + visible polygons; 64 lands ~9 verts/wave. Measured after: classic 13594, next 17330.

mirrorlake.oscene._comment: The planar-mirror sibling of the lake. Measured (deterministic 240-frame recipe): next 12.1 batches / 20968 tris - the compositor stat COUNTS the mirror pass's re-render (the lake's 17330 + the mirrored terrain/rocks/sky), so the next ceilings sit above the lake's. classic 8.1 / 13594: its primary-target stat does NOT include the mirror RTT pass, so its corridor matches the lake's (the mirror's cost shows in frame-ms, which is reported, not gated).
